data.name: page-title
data.value: Free Meowdoku! Level Solver: Find the Answer to Any Cat Puzzle

data.name: page-summary-descr
data.value: Solve Meowdoku levels quickly, safely, and completely free! Find solutions, answers, and hints for any level.

data.name: descr-summary
data.value: Tired of wasting hours on difficult Meowdoku levels? I've created a web app to free you from the tedious task of searching for the right combinations. It's fast, secure, and completely free. This isn't a clone of the game, but a fully-fledged solver that analyzes any level from the original Meowdoku and finds the only correct solution in seconds. No more hints or endless guessing — just upload a screenshot and get a clear answer.

data.name: local-work-title
data.value: Works entirely in your browser – secure and private

data.name: local-work-description
data.value: All calculations occur locally on your device. The app does not send your screenshots, level data, or solution history to any servers. All image processing and solution logic are performed entirely in the browser. You don't need to register, enter passwords, or trust your data to third parties.

data.name: auto-recognition-title
data.value: Automatic level recognition from screenshots – forget about manual input

data.name: auto-recognition-description
data.value: You'll no longer have to manually type numbers and colors from your phone screen. The app uses an intelligent computer vision algorithm that reads a screenshot of a Meowdoku level and instantly recreates the game board. Simply take a screenshot in the game, upload it to the solver, and in a split second, you'll see the completed solution with all the elements in place. This saves time and eliminates input errors.

data.name: open-source-description
data.value: I believe in transparency and community. The entire solver code is available on GitHub , so you can verify its security, study the algorithms, or even customize the project to suit your needs. If the app has helped you, please leave a star (⭐) in the project repository—it's the best way to say "thank you."

data.name: feedback-description
data.value: You can leave your feedback and suggestions on the project page at GitHub.

data.name: sell-text
data.value: Join the ranks of users who have already solved hundreds of Meowdoku levels in just two clicks – no pain, no servers, no fuss. Just a screenshot, and the solution is yours!
